text:
that will 
allow linkage between the PDE and Pharmacy Characteristics Files. 

Beginning with 2014 data, the NCPDP_ID is used in place of the CCW_PHARM_ID. Researchers who 
received CCW data from 2006–2013 and wish to identify the NCPDP_ID associated with the 
CCW_PHARM_ID may request the “Pharmacy Bridge File”, which is designed for this purpose. 

This variable is populated by linking the service provider identification number (SRVC_PRVDR_ID) from 
the source PDE to the proprietary National
